Australian Government
AUSTRAC

Key personnel

Home / Key personnel

Individuals who have the ability to influence business decisions over the entity’s finances

and operations. The legal meaning of ‘key personnel’ depends on the type of entity as
defined in the AML/CTF Rules.

See

AML/CTF Rules 2007 chapter 27.2 (9)

https://www.austrac.gov.au/glossary/key-personnel

1/1
